---
title: "Kevin's Place"
subtitle: "Investing · Technology · Strategy · Life"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my corner of the internet. I'm Kevin (Wenjie) Guo — I write about the things I spend my time thinking about.

This site is organized into five areas:

- **[Daily Writing](daily/index.qmd)** — Posts, reflections, and things I'm learning day to day
- **[Investing & Equity Research](investing/index.qmd)** — Analysis, investment theses, and market thinking
- **[App Development](appdev/index.qmd)** — Building applications and what I'm working on
- **[Strategy & Management](strategy/index.qmd)** — Ideas on business strategy and organizational thinking
- **[Meditation & Life](meditation/index.qmd)** — On mindfulness, well-being, and living better

---

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
#recent-posts {
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
</style>
```
